<!--
Thanks for contributing to BOTC Pro. Please keep PRs focused on one logical
change. For anything non-trivial, open an issue first so we can align on
direction before code review.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? 1-3 sentences. -->

## Motivation

<!-- Link the issue this closes (e.g. "Closes #123") or describe the
     user-facing problem this solves. -->

## Test plan

<!-- Steps the reviewer can follow to verify. Examples:
     - [ ] Ran `node test-st-qol.js` — all assertions pass.
     - [ ] Hosted a room on LAN, joined from a second desktop client, started
           a 7-player game, advanced to day, cast a nomination.
     - [ ] Joined via browser at http://localhost:7878, granted mic access,
           verified audio is single (not doubled) after ST opens a whisper.
-->

- [ ]

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] This change is scoped to one logical thing.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where it made sense.
- [ ] User-visible changes are noted in [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) under
      `## [Unreleased]`.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal info committed.
- [ ] Not touching rules/roles without a rulebook reference.
